title: Freeze Ne estimand, circularity, join, and source contracts
deliverables: Frozen schemas, vocabularies, circularity validator specification, response-dataset IDs
resource_envelope: 1 CPU; 4 GiB; 2 h; no network/bulk data
review_gate: Independent methods review accepts every hard gate

title: Audit vertebrate demographic and ecological metadata availability
inputs: Frozen VGP catalog snapshot after separate source permission; existing Tier3 manifests; bibliographic metadata only
deliverables: Row-level method eligibility/rejection ledger; candidate source inventory; bytes/licence estimate
resource_envelope: 2 CPU; 8 GiB; 16 h; <=5 GiB; metadata/API requests only
review_gate: Counts reproducible; 100% rows have disposition; no sequence download

title: Curate independent ecological, life-history, census, direct-mutation, and literature-Ne records
inputs: Approved source exports and primary papers
deliverables: Provenance-complete source table; duplicate/taxon audit; overlap/independence classification
resource_envelope: 4 CPU; 16 GiB; 40 h plus manual curation; <=20 GiB
review_gate: >=95% double-entry agreement; 100% accepted records have estimand/source/unit/taxon/uncertainty disposition

title: Freeze taxonomy, population joins, and phylogenetic tree ensemble
inputs: Accepted taxa, population locations/dates, approved phylogeny source
deliverables: Taxon crosswalk; population/reference joins; dated tree ensemble; unresolved ledger
review_gate: No fuzzy unresolved joins; every primary species has exact tip; tree uncertainty represented

title: Package demographic tools in separate pinned GNU Guix environments
inputs: Pinned source commits/tags and baseline channel commit
deliverables: Method-specific manifests/packages; derivations; closure hashes; license record; no biological run
resource_envelope: 8 CPU; 32 GiB; 8 h; <=30 GiB store growth estimate
review_gate: Build/test on login and compute-node smoke; legacy MSMC rejected; no latest/container ambiguity

title: Validate input converters, scaled-output parsers, circularity guard, and simulations
inputs: Tiny synthetic VCF/consensus/masks/pedigrees and known simulations
deliverables: Deterministic truth outputs; coverage/mask/phase error sensitivity; resource telemetry
review_gate: All parser invariants pass; scaled truth within prespecified interval; circular predictor injection fails closed

title: Resolve exact assets and estimate resources without bulk download
inputs: Provider metadata, file sizes/checksums, sample/reference relationships
deliverables: Eligible pilot manifest per method; low/base/high byte/core-hour/I-O budgets; exclusion ledger
resource_envelope: 4 CPU; 16 GiB; 16 h; <=10 GiB; HEAD/metadata only
review_gate: Every candidate has same-individual/reference/mask/sample/calibration disposition; quotas fit

title: Preregister phylogenetically aware independent-covariate analysis
inputs: Frozen source table, pi response schema, tree ensemble
deliverables: Model formula; DAG; missingness/error model; sensitivity set; simulation-based power
review_gate: No genomic-shared/circular record in design matrix; coefficient recovery and type-I calibration pass

title: AUTHORIZE bounded sequence staging and demographic pilot
inputs: Pilot manifest; Guix proof; low/base/high budget; privacy/licence/access record; storage/retention plan
deliverables: Explicit human decision with approved methods, species, byte/core-hour quotas, dates, and rollback owner
review_gate: Human explicitly approves exact manifest and resource envelope; silence or plan completion is NO

title: Stage only authorized pilot assets
deliverables: Checksummed immutable inputs; sample lists; references; masks; transfer logs; failure ledger
resource_envelope: Bounded by authorization; proposed <=6 species/method and <=2 TiB scratch total
review_gate: 100% checksum/reference/sample/callability gates; any quota breach stops descendants

title: Run method-specific demographic truth/pilot analyses
inputs: Frozen staged assets and method-specific Guix profiles
deliverables: Scaled histories/estimands first; scenario-scaled absolute outputs; logs; sacct/I-O telemetry
resource_envelope: Proposed aggregate <=2,000 core-h; <=256 GiB/job; <=2 TiB scratch; <=300 GiB persistent
review_gate: >=90% eligible rows complete; truth controls pass; bootstrap/scenario coverage and measured cost within 2x base

title: Independent scientific, circularity, and resource review
inputs: Pilot outputs, exclusions, telemetry, primary-model specification
deliverables: Go/no-go decision for each method/species; revised measured bounds; claim audit
review_gate: Zero leakage; zero invalid H1/H2 conversions; calibrated uncertainty; no unresolved severe failure

title: AUTHORIZE reviewed expansion wave
inputs: Pilot review and exact next-wave manifest
deliverables: Explicit human decision with wave-specific resource/download envelope
review_gate: Human approval required separately from pilot authorization

title: Run authorized method-specific expansion
deliverables: Complete success/failure census; scaled and scenario histories; telemetry
resource_envelope: Only explicit wave quota; bounded arrays and local scratch
review_gate: Stop if >10% hard-input failures, median runtime >2x pilot base, storage >110% quota, or any circularity/reference breach

title: Fit primary phylogenetic measurement-error model
inputs: Frozen independent predictors, pi responses, trees
deliverables: Primary fit, diagnostics, leave-clade-out results, missingness and prior sensitivities
review_gate: Convergence, posterior predictive/type-I checks, tree ensemble and leave-clade-out stability pass

title: Synthesize demographic histories without promoting them to independent predictors
inputs: Primary fit plus scaled/shared genomic summaries
deliverables: Tier-labeled figures/tables; claim matrix; provenance bundle
review_gate: Every panel labels estimand, scale, data overlap, calibration scenario and supported claim
